title: Hunts
summary: You are a stalking hunter who excels at bringing down your selected quarry.
tiers: Tier 3: Horde Fighting or Sprint and Grab
Tier 6: Greater Skill With Attacks or Multiple Quarry
Tier 3: Defensive Blinking or Teleportation Burst
gm_intrusions: A teleport goes awry, landing the character in a dangerous place. Inertia (such as from falling) continues through the teleport, injuring the character.
text: You are a stalking hunter who excels at bringing down your selected quarry. IGNORES PHYSICAL DISTANCE You can teleport from one place to another by briefly passing through a parallel dimension.
details: You are a stalking hunter who excels at bringing down your selected quarry.
You can teleport from one place to another by briefly passing through a parallel dimension.
